_doc: Default input fixture: arch-drift run against YAAH (the harness) — target (b) of the dog-food story (yaah's internals fully visible). Lands under docs/architecture/yaah-with-arch-drift.svg so target (a) (arch-drift-only.svg) can coexist in the same dir. For target (a), use fixtures/input-self.json — the example dir IS the architecture there.
